c74object.name: void.net.localip
c74object.digest: Output the local IPv4 address of the machine.
c74object.description:
void.net.localip outputs the local IPv4 address of the host machine, along with the associated network interface name.
The object performs a one-shot scan of the available network interfaces and returns the first valid non-loopback IPv4 address found on an active interface.
This object is macOS-only and is designed to be lightweight, stateless, and deterministic.

inlet.description: Sending a bang triggers a scan of the network interfaces and outputs the local IPv4 address and the corresponding interface name.

outlet.description:
Outputs the detected local IPv4 address (for example: 192.168.1.42).
If no valid address is found, outputs 0.0.0.0.

Outputs the name of the network interface associated with the IPv4 address (for example: en0, en1).
If no interface is found, outputs none.
